situational_context: Running comeback Day 81, Run #19 completed (19 structured runs since May 3). Currently on vacation in Saint-Malo (since Jul 12, returns Jul 27). Distances consistently 5-8 km range with longest run 8 km (Run #16, Jul 15) absorbed cleanly. VO2max running improved to 42 (from 38.3 at comeback start). ACWR normalized to 1.25 (within comeback band <=1.50). HRV weekly avg recovered to 38 ms from June dip. RHR improved to 47 bpm (from 50). Sleep excellent at 8.3h avg (vacation effect). Weight ~103.7 kg (last Withings Jun 21, no scale on vacation). No e-bike commuting during Saint-Malo stay. Training readiness volatile (39 today post-run, range 26-79 over the week). Vitamin D retest overdue (was due Jul 2026). No new labs since Dec 2025. Paris return Jul 27 — heat protocol applies for outdoor sessions.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Run #20 — 8 km Z2 long run (Saint-Malo, weekend)
Récupération active — marche côtière ou natation
Sur site — trajet vélo (e-bike ou gravel)
Run #21 — 6 km Z2 (Paris, indoor si chaleur >26°C ressenti)

recommendations.text: Run #20 samedi : maintenir 8 km Z2 facile sur sentier côtier Saint-Malo. FC cible <= 145 bpm. 9 km autorisé si excellentes sensations et Run #19 absorbé sans plainte tissulaire. Jour de repos vendredi entre les runs est critique.
recommendations.measurable: Run #20 completed at 8 km Z2 with HR avg <= 145 bpm and no post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Bilan sanguin vitamine D en retard (objectif juillet 2026, dernière valeur 27 ng/mL en décembre 2025). Programmer une prise de sang dans les 2 prochaines semaines pour vérifier la progression vers 40 ng/mL après 8+ mois de supplémentation.
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed and blood drawn by Aug 6, 2026

recommendations.text: Protocole chaleur pour le retour à Paris (28 juil+) : prévisions 28-33°C. Run #21 le 29 juil doit être en intérieur (tapis en clim) si le ressenti à 11h dépasse 26°C. La substitution indoor est la bonne atténuation vu la préférence horaire 11h-15h.
recommendations.measurable: Run #21 executed safely — indoor if feels-like >26C, outdoor if <=26C

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if training readiness stays below 40 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 39 post-run; range 26-79 over the week. Should recover on rest days.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Weigh in on Withings Sunday Jul 26 (pesée hebdo). Alert if >104.5 kg
markers_to_watch.reason: Last measurement 103.67 kg on Jun 21 — 32 days without data. Vacation eating may have shifted weight.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Lab order must be placed within 14 days
markers_to_watch.reason: Dec 2025 value 27 ng/mL (insufficient). 8 months of supplementation — retest overdue.
